subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that through His grace thou hast attained His presence and hast quaffed from the chalice of reunion, and hast been borne along the path of truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از فضل الهی بلقا فائز شدی و از کوثر وصال آشامیدی و در سبیل حق حمل
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the concourse on high
